headline: Is Marathon Petroleum (MPC) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Marathon Petroleum (MPC) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Marathon and Valero Have Surged: Is the Party Over or Just Getting Started?
summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC) and Valero Energy (NYSE: VLO) have both staged remarkable recoveries. Marathon is up 95.7% over the past year, and Valero has surged 127.8% over the same period. If you watched from the sidelines, it stings. But the more important question is what comes next. Valuation: Stretched or Still Reasonable? Marathon trades ... Marathon and Valero Have Surged: Is the Party Over or Just Getting Started?

headline: Phillips 66: Strong Execution, But The Stock Got There First
summary: Phillips 66 faces a $900M mark-to-market derivative loss and $3B cash outflow, raising total debt to $27B. Read why PSX stock is downgraded to a hold.

headline: ‘Weeks, if not months’: Strait of Hormuz tanker traffic won't normalize anytime soon
summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has yet to see a meaningful rebound and this could continue for weeks, warn shipping experts.
